strengths: 17+ years of polyglot, full-stack engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — comfortably exceeds the 15-year minimum.
Current role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure work: MCP (Model Context Protocol) code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, giving recent hands-on AI builder credibility.
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source founder experience (GISCollective) within a larger engineering career, aligning with the preferred startup-within-organization profile.
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; holds two Bachelor's degrees (Computer Science and Fine Arts), falling short of the preferred Master's/PhD qualification.

Career progression plateaus at Senior/Staff individual contributor; no evidence of director-level scope, strategic customer advisory engagements, or cross-organizational influence at the scale this role requires.

AI involvement is recent and narrow (current role only); no demonstrated track record of shipped AI-powered products or platforms at scale, recognized industry expertise, or public thought leadership in AI strategy.
response.justification: Bogdan brings solid engineering breadth and longevity, with a recent pivot into AI-agent tooling that shows genuine builder instincts. However, the role demands a director-level individual contributor who can shape AI strategy, advise strategic customers, and inspire broad internal and external audiences — a scope that his career history does not yet evidence. His AI work is nascent and unrecognized externally, his seniority has not crossed into organizational leadership or strategic influence, and he lacks the advanced AI credentials the role prefers. He is a strong craftsman candidate for a principal engineering IC role, but falls materially short of the strategic, advisory, and thought-leadership dimensions this position centers on.
